definitions.name: Imperial Relay Waystation
definitions.summary: A licensed post where the Empire's schedules change horses and the reaping is filed before it happens.

features.name: sweep dispatch case
features.description: A charter-sealed case holds the season's reconciliation schedule; the seal recites sums when unlicensed hands come near.
features.readable: Provincial Reconciliation Sweep, seasonal schedule: settlements and dates in clerk-perfect marching order. Whoever holds this knows where the reaping walks next, and when.

claims.text: The sweep schedule names every settlement the reaping will reconcile this season, in marching order.
claims.subject: sweep schedule

features.name: requisition ledger
features.description: Red-ruled pages list what the reaping has taken and from whom; several lines are deliberately blank where things escaped filing.
features.readable: Requisition Ledger, Provincial Reconciliation Sweep: confiscations tagged for the capital vaults, each line a family's name beside what was taken from it. Some lines are blank.

claims.text: A reed-cutter family's confiscated name-charm sits tagged for the capital vaults; the ledger records exactly which crate carries it.
claims.subject: confiscated name-charm

features.name: relay signal bell
features.description: A road-bell whose rope is knotted at a rider's reach; one pull tells the next post that something has gone wrong here.

definitions.name: Palace of Reasonable Peace
definitions.summary: White chambers turn fear into procedure before it can reach the throne.

features.name: petition weather ceiling
features.description: Clouds of rejected requests drift behind charter-glass and rain only on unauthorized visitors.

features.name: precedent throne
features.description: The seat is built from rulings rather than stone; each armrest cites the other.

features.name: merciful decree furnace
features.description: Unissued mercies burn with a clean blue flame that warms nobody.

definitions.name: Archive of Moving Responsibility
definitions.summary: File bridges and mobile cabinets follow whichever office is currently to blame.

features.name: ambulatory docket cabinet
features.description: Brass feet carry it one room away whenever its contents become relevant.

features.name: sealed contradiction table
features.description: Two true reports lie beneath glass because filing either would invalidate the room.

features.name: responsibility index
features.description: Every official name points carefully toward a different official name.
